messages: 240004	NULL	10 feb	text	Financial Markets Trading Company Limited
(Incorporated in Malaysia under the Labuan Companies Act 1990)
(Licensed Labuan Money Broker under the Labuan Financial Services and Securities Act 2010)
Directors’ Circular Resolution pursuant to Article 101 of the Company’s Articles of Association
WHEREAS with reference to the Renewal Notice of Rental Agreement dated 01
November 2023 and Addendum to Agreement dated 27 November 2025, the
Company has consented in writing to renew the rental agreement with Corporate
Services Trust Co Ltd (hereinafter referred to as “the Landlord”), for renting an office
space at Office 5, Unit F7, 1st Floor, Paragon Labuan, Jalan Tun Mustapha, 87000
F.T. Labuan, Malaysia, covering from 01 January 2024 until 31 December 2025.
RENEWAL OF SERVICE AGREEMENT FOR OPERATIONAL OFFICE
THAT approval be and is hereby given to the Company to give the Landlord a two (2)
months written notice to renew the term of tenancy for another one (1) year, covering
from 01 January 2026 until 31 December 2026, upon the same terms and conditions
pursuant to Section 6.3 of the rental agreement.
AND THAT any one Director of the Company be and is hereby authorized to sign the
written notice and to do all such acts and things and to take all such steps as may be
deemed fit, necessary, expedient and/or appropriate in order to implement, finalize
and give full effect to the abovementioned transaction, for and on behalf of the
JOHANN JOOSTEN XORALE EMRY PARAS	NULL	NULL	2026-02-10 14:00:55	2026-02-10 14:00:55
I Hereby Certify that THE DOWNTOWN BUSINESS CENTER INC. changed its name to
INNOVATIVE COMMERCIAL PROPERTIES CORP. on April 2, 2024 at 11:32 AM Pacific Time.
Issued under my hand at Victoria, British Columbia

240004	NULL	10 feb	text	Financial Markets Trading Company Limited
(Company No. LL17171) (Licence No. MB/21/0066)
(Incorporated in Malaysia under the Labuan Companies Act 1990)
(Licensed Labuan Money Broker under the Labuan Financial Services and Securities Act 2010)
Directors’ Circular Resolution pursuant to Article 101 of the Company’s Articles of Association
WHEREAS with reference to the Renewal Notice of Rental Agreement dated 01
November 2023 and Addendum to Agreement dated 27 November 2025, the
Company has consented in writing to renew the rental agreement with Corporate
Services Trust Co Ltd (hereinafter referred to as “the Landlord”), for renting an office
space at Office 5, Unit F7, 1st Floor, Paragon Labuan, Jalan Tun Mustapha, 87000
F.T. Labuan, Malaysia, covering from 01 January 2024 until 31 December 2025.
RENEWAL OF SERVICE AGREEMENT FOR OPERATIONAL OFFICE
01 JANUARY 2026 TO 31 DECEMBER 2026
RESOLVED:
THAT approval be and is hereby given to the Company to give the Landlord a two (2)
months written notice to renew the term of tenancy for another one (1) year, covering
from 01 January 2026 until 31 December 2026, upon the same terms and conditions
pursuant to Section 6.3 of the rental agreement.
AND THAT any one Director of the Company be and is hereby authorized to sign the
written notice and to do all such acts and things and to take all such steps as may be
deemed fit, necessary, expedient and/or appropriate in order to implement, finalize
and give full effect to the abovementioned transaction, for and on behalf of the
Company.
Dated this 27 November 2025
BOARD OF DIRECTORS
